hero.line2: — Bring your ideas to life, bespoke.
hero.lead: ARREDA transforms your spaces with woodwork made in our Yimbaya workshop, next to Sonapi.
hero.heroAlt: Custom staircase — interior architecture, wood and curves, ARREDA project

teaser.title: Our projects
teaser.lead: A snapshot of completed sites. Open a project page for the full gallery — often photos taken after handover only.

home.pillarsImageAlt: ARREDA worker taking measurements at cutting equipment

services.title: Residential furniture
services.description: Living rooms, bedrooms and kitchens designed for daily life.

services.title: Office furniture
services.description: Desks, storage and open-plan layouts for productive teams.

services.title: Commercial fit-out
services.description: Hotels, restaurants and retail: brand image plus durability.

services.title: Renovation & transformation
services.description: Give existing joinery a second life with our craftsmen.

services.title: Interior styling advice
services.description: Harmony of materials, colours and volumes for a coherent interior.

services.title: Delivery & installation
services.description: On-site measuring, fitting and adjustments across Guinea.

pillars.title: Local production
pillars.text: We manufacture in our workshop — not an imported catalogue.

pillars.title: Fully bespoke
pillars.text: Dimensions, finishes and ergonomics tailored to your room.

pillars.title: Delivery & installation
pillars.text: Field teams for careful installation and a flawless finish.

testimonials.quote: Custom living room delivered in three weeks, flawless finishes. ARREDA transformed our lounge.
testimonials.name: Mamadou

testimonials.quote: Fitted kitchen for our flat: listening, advice and respect for the budget.
testimonials.name: Fatoumata

testimonials.quote: Office open space: acoustics, storage and modern design. Very professional.

servicesPage.waQuote: Hello ARREDA, I would like a quote for: {title}.
servicesPage.heroLead: From design to installation we cover the full cycle: residential, offices, commercial and on-site follow-up. Each project is shaped for the climate, how you use the space and your budget in Conakry.
servicesPage.ctaTitle: Have a project in mind? Let’s talk now.
servicesPage.ctaLead: Quick replies on WhatsApp — quotes, measurements or a workshop visit.

realisationsPage.metaDescription: Each card opens a project: story, location, and photo gallery.
realisationsPage.title: Projects
realisationsPage.lead: A selection of sites delivered by ARREDA. Each page brings together the project story and a gallery — often photos taken after completion, when “before” shots do not exist.

projectPage.ctaLead: Tell us about your project — we will come back with a tailored proposal.
projectPage.waInterest: Hello ARREDA, I am interested in the project "{title}". Could you tell me more?
